data.title: MetaMask officially integrates native support for TRON networks.
data.description: MetaMask has officially launched native support for the TRON network in its mobile app and browser extension wallet. This integration, a collaboration between MetaMask and the TRON DAO, aims to advance its multi-chain expansion strategy. Users can now directly manage TRON assets within MetaMask, interact with native TRON DApps, and exchange assets between TRON, EVM-compatible networks, Solana, and Bitcoin. Furthermore, this update also supports sending USDT and staking TRX on the TRON network. Currently, the TRON network handles over $21 billion in daily stablecoin transactions.

data.title: US crypto market structure bill in limbo as industry pulls support
data.description:
The crypto market structure bill in the US Senate has been delayed amid disagreements among lawmakers and influential cryptocurrency companies.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/us-crypto-market-structure-bill-limbo-industry-support?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: BSX Shares Dip as Boston Scientific Unveils Biggest Deal in 20 Years
data.description:

data.title: Inflation Pressure Expected to Persist Until 2026, Says Fed's Bostic
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Bostic has indicated that inflationary pressures are anticipated to continue until 2026.

data.title: Strategy to Announce Q4 2025 Financial Results in February 2026
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Bitcoin treasury company Strategy has announced plans to release its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 5, 2026, following the close of the U.S. financial markets. An online video conference will be held at 5:00 PM Eastern Time to interpret and discuss the financial report.

data.title: Dollar Index Experiences Short-Term Increase
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the dollar index (DXY) has seen a short-term rise of 10 points, currently reported at 99.36.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Goolsbee Emphasizes Inflation Reduction as Key Objective
data.description: According to PANews, Federal Reserve official Goolsbee stated that reducing inflation to 2% remains the most important goal. He noted that there is significant room for interest rates to decrease, but emphasized the need for strong evidence of declining inflation.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Goolsby: Expects the Fed to cut rates this year, but needs data to confirm his expectations.
data.description: Federal Reserve's Goolsby: The Fed expects to cut interest rates this year, but data is needed to confirm his expectations.

data.title: CME Group will launch Cardano, Chainlink, and Stellar futures on February 9th.
data.description: CME Group, the Chicago Mercantile Exchange Group, announced that it will launch Cardano, Chainlink, and Stellar futures on February 9 to expand its portfolio of crypto derivatives.

data.title: Mantra project leaves 7% of OM supply locked as migration window ends
data.description:
Mantra (OM) announced the last day for its token migration, although around 7% of the supply is still stuck on Ethereum. Matnra's CEO JP Mullin announced team restructuring, citing worsened crypto market conditions and the crash of OM in April 2025.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/mantra-om-supply-locked-migration-ends/

data.title: Bitcoin Emerges as Top Cashtag on X Platform
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin has recently become one of the most searched Cashtags on the X platform, as reported by Bitcoin Magazine.

data.title: The number of initial jobless claims in the U.S. for the week ending January 10 was lower than expected.
data.description: The number of Americans filing for initial jobless claims for the week ending January 10 was 198,000, compared to a forecast of 215,000 and a revised figure of 207,000 for the previous week (originally reported as 208,000). (Jinshi)

data.title: JustLend DAO completes its second JST buyback and destruction.
data.description: According to official news, JustLend DAO officially completed its second JST token buyback and burn today, burning a total of 525 million JST tokens, worth approximately $21 million. The tokens have been transferred to the black hole address. The funds for this burn came from the protocol's net proceeds in the fourth quarter of 2025 and past accumulated proceeds. As of January 15, 2026, the cumulative number of JST tokens burned has reached 1,084,890,753, accounting for 10.96% of the total supply. JustLend DAO will continue to perform buybacks and burns quarterly and will regularly and transparently disclose progress to the community.

data.title: Argentina’s Lemon exchange launches Visa credit card backed by BTC collateral
data.description:
Lemon, a crypto exchange with over 5. 5 million users in Argentina, announced the launch of Argentina’s first “Bitcoin-backed VISA credit card. ” The new product will allow users to lock up BTC as collateral to access peso credit lines without selling their coins. Reports say that the card works on a rudimentary basis with set boundaries […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/lemon-launch-visa-credit-card-btc-collateral/

data.title: Beast Industries raises $200 million, led by BitMine.
data.description: Beast Industries announced the completion of a $200 million funding round led by BitMine. The company's core business is media and consumer holding, encompassing content production, consumer brands Feastables and MrBeast Burger, and business investments. BitMine stated that it has agreed to invest $200 million in Beast Industries, the media and consumer holding company founded by YouTube creator MrBeast. BitMine currently holds over 4 million ETH, worth approximately $13 billion, making it the world's largest holder of Ethereum. Beast Industries CEO Jeff Housenbold stated that the funds will be used to support growth plans and explore integrating decentralized finance (DeFi) functionality into future financial services products. The transaction is expected to close around January 19th.
